name: clip2video
description: Ableton Live Extension: render deterministic, music-locked MP4s via HyperFrames

scripts.package:ext: node tools/build-extension.mjs --production && rm -f templates/pulse-waveform/timeline.json templates/pulse-waveform/timeline.js templates/pulse-waveform/audio.wav templates/pulse-waveform/meta.json && extensions-cli package -o dist/clip2video.ablx -i panel -i templates .
